notes: From the safe guildhall Carl goes back out and finishes off the goblins: he throws one into the Murder Dozer's spinning blades and stomps the Level-3 Goblin Engineer to death with his bare feet, then dives back inside as the dozer's boiler breaches and explodes. The blast is redirected at him but the star-destroyer-grade guild door holds. These fights push him to Level 2 and raise Pugilism to 4. Mordecai gives Carl the quick history of the Syndicate, Borant Corporation and the World Dungeon 'game show'.

set.location: World Dungeon — Floor 1 (Tutorial Guild Hall — a Safe Zone)

add.name: Pugilism
add.description: The art of beating the shit out of opponents with closed fists. Each level increases bare-knuckle damage by 25%.

add.name: You've Killed a Mob a Higher Level Than Yourself!
add.reward: You've received a Bronze Adventurer Box!
add.description: Killed the Level-3 Goblin Engineer while himself a lower level.

add.name: Podophilia!
add.reward: You've received a Gold Shoe Box!
add.description: Used his bare feet to crush and kill an opponent (leaping onto the Goblin Engineer).

add.name: Boom!
add.reward: You've received a Silver Goblin Box!
add.description: Caused a wall-shaking explosion within the dungeon (the Murder Dozer's boiler breach).

add.name: Level-Up, Baby!
add.description: Earned enough experience to gain a level, reaching Level 2 and gaining 3 stat points.

sources.quote: Level Up! You are now level 2. Three stat points gained.
You’ve gained a skill level! Pugilism Level 4. The art of beating the shit out of your opponents with closed fists. Each level of this skill increases your bare-knuckle damage by 25%.

New achievement! Podophilia! You’ve used your bare feet to crush and kill an opponent! ... Reward: You’ve received a Gold Shoe Box! New achievement! Boom! You’ve caused a wall-shaking explosion within the dungeon! ... Reward: You’ve received a Silver Goblin Box!
I received three stat points every time I leveled up, but I couldn’t distribute them until I picked a race and class. And I couldn’t do that until I reached the third floor down.
